name: Zytronic plc
summary: Zytronic plc, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and markets interactive touch sensor products. The company offers touchscreens in gaming; retail, leisure, and commercial applications; digital signage; vending; banking; and industrial applications, as well as touch controllers. It provides single and multi-touch sensing technology. The company markets its products through a network of representatives and resellers. It primarily operates in the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Hungary, the United Kingdom, the Asia Pacific, and South Korea. Zytronic plc was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Blaydon-on-Tyne, the United Kingdom.
